name: I'm aboard Pirate ship anchored off shore
description: I'm aboard Pirate ship anchored off shore
hints: You are aboard the pirate ship. You can sail to Treasure Island or go ashore.
To SET SAIL, you need the pirate as crew and a map. The pirate will not sail with the accursed book aboard.
Remove the blood-soaked book from the ship before setting sail. You need the pirate crew and the map.
Drop the book on shore first. With pirate and map: SET SAIL to reach Treasure Island. GO SHORE to disembark.

needs: Wicked looking pirate (must be in room)
effects:
Message: Pirate says:
`First Yee be getting that ACCURSED thing off me ship!`

needs: Wicked looking pirate (must be in room)
effects:
Message: Pirate says: `Aye me Buckeroo, we be waiting for the tide to
 come in!`

needs: Wicked looking pirate (must be in room)
effects: Message: Pirate follows me ashore as if expecting something
Message: Pirate says: `Aye matey we be needing a map first`.

Message: After a day at sea we set anchor off of a sandy beach.
 All Ashore who's going Ashore...

Message: After a day at sea we set anchor off of a sandy beach.
 All Ashore who's going Ashore...

notes: Pirate ship - the means of reaching Treasure Island. Requires: pirate crew (give rum in shack), map (from duffel bag), and the blood-soaked book must NOT be aboard. SET SAIL with proper conditions reaches Treasure Island. Repeated sailing without proper setup can be fatal.
